description: A composite image. The left side shows a dim surveillance still of a woman in a cap and dark top inside a building. The right side is a grid of eight identity-document photographs of a woman at different ages, each captioned with a document type and date, including a Colombian cedula, a visa application, state ID cards, driver's licenses, a learner's permit, a REAL ID and a passport application under various names.
notable_text: Colombian Cedula; Visa application; MA driver's license; MA REAL ID; Passport application
